evals.prompt: I want to set up my GitHub profile to look good for recruiters. My username is 'jchen-dev'. I'm a full-stack developer at a fintech startup, working mostly with React, Node.js, and PostgreSQL. I've been coding for 4 years and have a few open source projects with ~50 stars each. I want to seem professional but approachable.
evals.expected_behavior: Recognizes this as a GitHub profile optimization task, gathers profile context, and produces profile README plus metadata and pinned-repo recommendations tailored to recruiter-facing positioning.
assertions: Routes to the github-profile skill rather than github-repo
Accounts for personal profile surfaces such as the username/username README
Includes README, bio, and pinned-repository strategy guidance

evals.prompt: Help me create an organization profile README for our startup 'NebulaDev'. We make developer tools — our main product is an open-source deployment platform called 'nebula-deploy' with 2k stars. We also have a CLI tool and a VS Code extension. We're hiring and want the profile to attract both contributors and potential hires.
evals.expected_behavior: Recognizes this as an organization profile task, accounts for org-specific README location and profile surfaces, and recommends README, pinned-project, and hiring-oriented presentation updates.
assertions: Distinguishes organization profile handling from personal profile handling
References the org-profile README surface rather than the personal magic repo
Includes recommendations for showcasing products, contributors, and hiring signals

evals.prompt: My GitHub profile looks bare — username is 'maria-codes'. I've been coding for 3 years, mostly Python and data science stuff (pandas, scikit-learn, pytorch). I have a few Jupyter notebook repos but no profile README at all. I want something that shows I'm serious about ML/AI work.
evals.expected_behavior: Treats this as a personal GitHub profile build-out, recommends a new profile README plus profile and pinned-repo improvements, and tailors the content to ML and data-science credibility.
assertions: Recommends creating a personal profile README
Tailors the profile framing to ML and data science work
Includes advice on making pinned notebook-heavy repositories look stronger
